_comment: Gates for benchmarks/perf/run_perf.py. Two classes: 'deterministic' metrics are identical on every run by construction (fixture tokenizer, scripted replies, seeded fixtures) so the ceilings are tight; 'latency' metrics vary with the host, so the ceilings are generous absolute ms bounds meant to catch order-of-magnitude regressions, not noise. Baseline snapshot: benchmarks/perf_baseline.json.

chat_long._comment: Phase 3 headline. The billed-input ceiling for the both-flags config is precomputed as 65% of the measured flags-off run (58262.30 billed tokens -> ceiling 37870), i.e. the gate fails unless both-on stays at least 35% cheaper than off. Measured at gate-setting time: both = 24283.50 (58.3% reduction). summary_regenerations asserts batched (not per-turn) summary refresh — 7 regenerations across ~18 over-budget turns at gate-setting time.
